privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real forensic test data downloaded from the DFTT project (NTFS File Recovery Test Image). The target case name is 'Court_Prep_2024' with case number 'INV-TAG-006'. The required disk image path is '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'. The task involves tagging deleted files (ground truth calculated dynamically via TSK fls) as 'Notable Item' with the comment 'Deleted file - evidence of potential data destruction', and allocated files as 'Follow Up' with the comment 'Active file - content review required for relevance'. Finally, it requires a summary report at '/home/ga/Reports/tagging_summary.txt'. All metadata claims perfectly match the task instructions, setup/export scripts, and verifier logic.
